title: moehringia stellarioides
intro: Moehringia stellarioides, also known as Starry Alpine Pearlwort, is a low-growing, mat-forming perennial plant native to the high mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Moehringia stellarioides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and combat infections.
